title: The Role of the Higher Education in the Development of the Agriculture
abstract: The aim of our article is to show the importance of the agriculture in the global life. One of the most important challenges of the world to produce enough food for the growing population of the Earth. The food production needs to be increased not only because of the growth in population but also because of the changing dietary habits. While the agriculture tries to produce more food they have to solve several problems. Increasing need for water, soil degradation and climate changethese are only a few of the most important problems we are facing right now. We have to increase the agricultural production on less arable landbut the question is: how?
subject: Geography
Archaeology
